arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel leaves three England stars out of squad as Morgan Gibbs-White decision made
arts.sum: UEFA rules state that a manager can only select a maximum of 23 players per fixture, meaning that three of Thomas Tuchel's 26-man England squad have missed out on Friday's clash with Albania

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel 'drops three England players' for Albania match including Liverpool, Nottingham Forest talents
arts.sum: England head coach Thomas Tuchel reportedly omits three players from his matchday squad to face Albania in Friday's World Cup 2026 Qualifying match at Wembley.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer admits shock at Thomas Tuchel call-up after urging England pick to retire
arts.sum: Newcastle legend Alan Shearer has admitted he was surprised to see Dan Burn called up for England duty by Thomas Tuchel, days after joking with him about retirement
